channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Deck Officers
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.title: [Gold Job] OPEN VACANCY FOR CH. OFFICER- EU citizen at

item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

A Master 500 GT+ is sought for a survey vessel operating remotely from shore. The position is based in the Netherlands with shifts of 8-12 hours. Requirements include a Master 500 GT CoC or higher, with a UK CoC preferred or willingness to complete the LAP course. Candidates must currently reside in the Netherlands. Joining is scheduled for Week 30.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master 500 GT+ Vacancy on Survey Vessel at Helder Maritiem

item.description:
Location: London, United Kingdom
Description:

A 3rd Officer position is available on a self-unloader bulker. The role is based in London, United Kingdom. Key requirements and contract details will be provided upon application.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 3rd Officer Job on Self-Unloader Bulker at V.Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Master position is available on an LNG vessel with 95000 DWT. The joining date is at the beginning of August for a 3-month contract. Interested candidates should apply through the careers portal.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master Vacancy on LNG Vessel at Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement CSC Romania
[Gold Job] Second Officer DPO for DP2 AHTS vessel at

item.description:
Location: Indonesia
Description:

A Master is sought for a bulk carrier position. Candidates require a minimum of 2 years of experience in a similar role and vessel type, with valid seaman documents (minimum 1 year validity). The maximum age is 55 years. The contract duration is 6 months, with operations in Indonesia. Immediate joining is required.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master Vacancy on Bulk Carrier at PT. Amancare Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Master mariners with container vessel background are sought for a growing mega-container fleet. Opportunities are available on modern newbuild and dual-fuel vessels. This role offers competitive employment and long-term career development within a leading crew management company.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master Vacancy on Container Vessel at Haque & Sons Ltd.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Master is sought for a cable laying vessel. Candidates should possess relevant experience for this maritime role. Applications are being reviewed, and suitable candidates will be contacted for potential future vacancies.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master Vacancy on Cable Laying Vessel at Columbia Aurus Ship Management Pvt. Ltd.
[Gold Job] Chief Officer / General cargo vessel / ASAP at
[Gold Job] Chief Officer DPO for DP2 Fast Supply Intervention Vessel / Crew Boat at
